case_title: THAKOR, B.D. vs. BARBER, PAUL et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT BARBER, PAUL VARGAS, ROBERT (SUED AS VEGES)

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, B.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-17-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 624 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-24-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM #624. JOHN ERTOLA, VISITING JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. MAUREEN BRADY, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: DAVID G. MENDEZ, ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF. ALSO PRESENT WERE DEFENDANTS IN PRO PER PAUL BARBER AND ROBERT VEGAS. 2:50 P.M. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AND FOR $3,475.00. PLAINTIFF B. D. THAKOR WAS NOT PRESENT. SEE CLERK MINUTES FOR MORE DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARBER, PAUL VEGAS, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE # 299B SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94110 $3,475.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,475.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-16-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH; STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION THROUGH 9:00 A.M. ON 9/16/98. EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COST AND ATTORNEY FEES. NEITHER PARTY ADMITS LIABILITY. SATISFACTION OF JUDGMT. TO BE FILED UPON TIMELY COMPLIANCE WITH ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS HEREIN. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
